posture: Sample workspace metadata only — replace after approved intake. No raw/private files are published.

summary.recommendedNextStep: Confirm parking strategy, target unit count, and underwriting assumptions before design lock.

scenarios.name: Conventional Mix
scenarios.strength: Lower operational complexity and easier resident parking story.
scenarios.watchout: Lower unit yield may underperform land/carry cost sensitivity.

scenarios.name: Efficiency-forward baseline
scenarios.strength: Higher unit yield and stronger attainable-rent positioning.
scenarios.watchout: Needs clear parking/TDM narrative and market support.

scenarios.name: Maximum Micro Mix
scenarios.strength: Highest gross rent and housing production count.
scenarios.watchout: Highest entitlement, operations, and lender-underwriting friction.

actions.next: Compare ratio, code path, neighborhood comps, and resident operations plan.

actions.item: Choose baseline mix for architect test-fit
actions.next: Freeze one primary scenario and one alternate for schematic massing.
Document comp set, concessions, achievable rent bands, and lease-up risk.
Run cost per unit and cost per NSF bands against all three scenarios.

evidence.safeNext: Convert research into citeable decision memo.
Publish sanitized summary metrics, not source workbook.
Add sheet/page references after intake approval.

parkingTracker.note: Likely best balance if TDM support is strong.
Needs strongest evidence and operating plan.
